title: CSP Phase 2 + remaining SPEC-046 coverage gaps

tasks.title: Audit current CSP middleware config and document baseline state
tasks.description: Read apps/web/src/lib/middleware-helpers.ts and any related CSP config files. Document: current directives per category (script-src, style-src, frame-src, connect-src, img-src, font-src), Report-Only header name, nonce injection point, and report-uri. Also list which routes the middleware applies to. Output: a concise markdown checklist to guide the remaining tasks. Tests: none (audit only).

subtasks.title: Note which routes are excluded from middleware

tasks.title: Reproduce public-pages CSP crawl baseline (T-014 scope)
tasks.description: Using the same technique as SPEC-046 T-014 (curl or Playwright headless + console violation capture), crawl the main public routes: /, /es/, /es/alojamientos/, /es/destinos/, /es/blog/. For each route: capture any CSP violation reports emitted to the browser console and any Sentry CSP ingestion. Document results to compare against authenticated crawl (T-016). Tests: none (operational baseline).

subtasks.title: Document all console CSP violations per route

tasks.title: Diagnose why /es/ home route does not emit CSP header
tasks.description: From SPEC-046 T-014 finding: /es/ body has nonce-stamped tags (middleware ran) but the response header Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only is missing. Diagnose the root cause: (1) curl -I https://staging.hospeda.com.ar/es/ with verbose tracing; (2) add temporary debug log in middleware step 9 to confirm it sets the header for /es/; (3) check Astro node-adapter response wrapping for prerendered routes; (4) check Coolify/Traefik header-stripping rules. Document the root cause clearly before implementing the fix in T-004. Tests: none (diagnostic).

subtasks.title: Add debug log to middleware and deploy to staging

tasks.title: Implement fix for home CSP header emission in middleware or Astro adapter
tasks.description: Based on the root cause identified in T-003, implement the fix so /es/ consistently emits Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only. Likely locations: apps/web/src/middleware.ts, apps/web/src/lib/middleware-helpers.ts, or astro.config.ts (headers config). The fix must not break other routes. Unit tests: add/update test in apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/csp-middleware.test.ts verifying the header is set for all routes including /es/. Run pnpm typecheck --filter=hospeda-web and pnpm lint before committing.

subtasks.title: Deploy to staging and curl /es/ to confirm header present
Verify other routes still emit header

tasks.title: Verify /es/ home route now emits CSP header on staging
tasks.description: After deploying T-004 fix: curl -I https://staging.hospeda.com.ar/es/ and confirm Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only header is present with the same directives as other routes (e.g. /es/alojamientos/). Screenshot or save the response headers. This is acceptance criterion 2.C: done when curl on /es/ shows the header. Tests: none (verification step). Document result in a short note.

subtasks.title: Confirm header present and matches other routes

tasks.title: Set up staging authenticated session for crawl (test credentials and session token)
tasks.description: Create or identify a staging test account with HOST role that has at least one accommodation in /mi-cuenta/propiedades/ and an active billing subscription (to access /es/suscriptores/checkout/). Obtain a valid session cookie (using pnpm db:seed:ready-user or manually seeded user). Document the credentials and session capture method so T-007/T-008/T-009/T-010 can reuse them. Tests: none (setup only). Reference: docs/migration/mercadopago-sandbox-runbook.md for MP sandbox test users.

subtasks.title: Identify or create staging test account with HOST role
Ensure account has accommodation + active subscription
Capture session cookie for authenticated crawl
Document credentials and session capture method

tasks.title: Crawl auth flows authenticated — sign-in, sign-up, OAuth callback + form submission
tasks.description: Using the session from T-006, crawl /es/auth/sign-in/ and /es/auth/sign-up/ — including form submission and redirect flow (not just page load). Capture all CSP violation reports in browser DevTools console. For OAuth: note any callback URL violations. Log violations with format: {route, violatedDirective, blockedUri, count}. This is part of 2.A authenticated crawl. Tests: none (operational crawl). Output: structured violation log for T-016 consolidation.

subtasks.title: Trigger OAuth flow and capture callback violations
Log all violations in structured format

tasks.title: Crawl mi-cuenta routes authenticated — favoritos, colecciones, historial
tasks.description: Authenticated crawl of /es/mi-cuenta/favoritos/, /es/mi-cuenta/colecciones/, /colecciones/[id]/, /es/mi-cuenta/historial/. Open each route with the session from T-006. Trigger island interactions (FavoriteButton, MoveToCollectionModal, CreateEditCollectionModal, CollectionDetailActions). Capture all CSP violations. Log format: {route, violatedDirective, blockedUri, count}. Tests: none (operational crawl). Output: structured violation log for T-016.

subtasks.title: Log all violations in structured format

tasks.title: Crawl owner routes authenticated — propiedades/* including file upload and image previews
tasks.description: Authenticated crawl of /es/mi-cuenta/propiedades/* owner forms — large surface with many inputs, file upload, and image previews. Interact with each sub-route (create, edit, manage). Capture all CSP violations. Log format: {route, violatedDirective, blockedUri, count}. Pay special attention to inline styles in image preview components (SPEC-046 T-006 blind spot). Tests: none (operational crawl). Output: structured violation log for T-016.

subtasks.title: Trigger file upload and image preview interactions
Log all violations in structured format

tasks.title: Crawl checkout → MercadoPago Brick load with CSP violation capture
tasks.description: Highest-risk crawl. Using authenticated session + MP sandbox credentials, navigate to /es/suscriptores/precios/ then /es/suscriptores/checkout/. Let the MP Brick widget fully load. Capture ALL CSP violations in DevTools console — pay attention to frame-src (iframe), connect-src (API calls), script-src (SDK load), img-src (card icons), font-src (MP fonts). Note the exact violatedDirective and blockedUri for each. This drives T-011 research and T-012/T-013/T-014 config fixes. Tests: none (operational crawl).

subtasks.title: Open DevTools Network + Console before navigating
Navigate to /es/suscriptores/checkout/ and let Brick load
Capture all CSP violations with violatedDirective + blockedUri

tasks.title: Research MP Brick CSP requirements — map violations to required allowlist entries
tasks.description: Using T-010 violation log + MP developer docs (CSP section), map each violation to the exact CSP directive and domain value to allow. Build a table: {directive, domain, reason}. Compare with what the spec anticipated (frame-src mlstatic.com/mercadopago.com, connect-src api.mercadopago.com, img-src mlstatic.com, font-src mlstatic.com). Note any unexpected domains. Reference: https://www.mercadopago.com.ar/developers/en/docs/checkout-bricks/additional-content/security/csp. Tests: none (research task). Output: table drives T-012/T-013/T-014.

subtasks.title: Map each T-010 violation to directive + domain
Identify any unexpected domains not in spec

tasks.title: Add frame-src entries for mercadopago.com and mlstatic.com to CSP config
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/lib/middleware-helpers.ts (or equivalent CSP builder), add frame-src allowlist entries: https://*.mercadopago.com https://*.mlstatic.com (and any additional domains found in T-011). Current frame-src is 'none' — this is a required change for MP Brick PCI-scoped iframe. Run pnpm typecheck --filter=hospeda-web and pnpm lint. Unit test: update apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/csp-middleware.test.ts to assert frame-src includes these domains.

subtasks.title: Add frame-src entries in CSP builder
Update unit test for frame-src directive

tasks.title: Add connect-src entry for api.mercadopago.com to CSP config
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/lib/middleware-helpers.ts (CSP builder), add https://api.mercadopago.com (and any additional API domains found in T-011) to the connect-src directive. Run pnpm typecheck --filter=hospeda-web and pnpm lint. Unit test: update apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/csp-middleware.test.ts to assert connect-src includes this domain.

subtasks.title: Add connect-src entry in CSP builder
Update unit test for connect-src directive

tasks.title: Add img-src and font-src entries for mlstatic.com to CSP config
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/lib/middleware-helpers.ts (CSP builder), add https://*.mlstatic.com to both img-src and font-src directives (MP Brick loads card-type icons and webfonts from mlstatic). Also add any additional asset domains found in T-011. Run pnpm typecheck --filter=hospeda-web and pnpm lint. Unit test: update apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/csp-middleware.test.ts to assert img-src and font-src include mlstatic.com.

subtasks.title: Update unit test for img-src and font-src directives

tasks.title: Deploy CSP config changes to staging and verify MP Brick loads without CSP errors
tasks.description: After T-012/T-013/T-014 are committed: deploy to staging (trigger Coolify redeploy for hospeda-web-staging). Navigate to /es/suscriptores/checkout/ with authenticated session + MP sandbox credentials. Let Brick fully load. Verify zero CSP errors in browser console. Also attempt a test payment to confirm end-to-end. If violations remain, document them and fix before continuing. This is acceptance criterion 2.B: done when checkout works with zero CSP errors.

subtasks.title: Trigger Coolify redeploy for web staging
Open checkout page with session + MP sandbox
Verify zero CSP console errors during Brick load
Document pass/fail with screenshots if needed

tasks.title: Consolidate authenticated crawl violation logs into structured report
tasks.description: Merge violation logs from T-007/T-008/T-009 (and T-002 public baseline) into a single report. For each violation found: assess whether it needs a CSP fix or is already handled. Group by directive and route. Identify any blockers for the Phase 2 flip. Produce the verification-authenticated-YYYY-MM-DD.md draft (assertions a-g) per the spec format. This feeds T-027 (final report commit) and T-017 (pre-flip gate check). Tests: none.

subtasks.title: Assess each violation: fix-needed vs acceptable

tasks.title: Verify zero net-new violation types in Sentry trailing 7-day data
tasks.description: Pre-flip gate check. In Sentry dashboard: filter CSP violation events for hospeda-web (staging + prod) to the last 7 days. Count distinct violatedDirective+blockedUri combinations that are new vs what existed before SPEC-046 deployed. Goal: zero new types (excluding the known GAP-046-10 eval-probe). Also confirm that T-015 checkout fix removed the MP Brick violations from Sentry. Document findings. Only when this check passes can T-020 (the flip) proceed. Tests: none (operational gate).

subtasks.title: Count net-new violation types vs SPEC-046 baseline
Confirm MP Brick violations removed after T-015

tasks.title: Write unit tests for CSP middleware home-route header emission
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/csp-middleware.test.ts (create if not exists): add test cases verifying that the middleware sets Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only for /es/ (home route) — the bug fixed in T-004. Test that the header value is non-empty and contains key directives (default-src, script-src, frame-src). Also test that the middleware does NOT skip any route. Run pnpm test --filter=hospeda-web to confirm green.

subtasks.title: Write test: header value contains expected directives

tasks.title: Write integration test verifying home /es/ route emits CSP header
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/ or apps/web/test/: add an integration test (using Astro test utilities or a simple HTTP test) that starts the web server and verifies /es/ response includes Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only header. This is a regression test for the gap found in SPEC-046 T-014. Pattern: startTestServer → fetch('/es/') → assert headers. Run pnpm test --filter=hospeda-web.

subtasks.title: Create integration test file for route header verification
Implement HTTP test for /es/ CSP header
Assert header name and non-empty value

tasks.title: Flip header name from Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only to Content-Security-Policy
tasks.description: ONE-LINE CHANGE in apps/web/src/lib/middleware-helpers.ts: change the response header setter from 'Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only' to 'Content-Security-Policy'. This is the entire Phase 2 flip. Pre-requisites (must ALL be green before this task): T-017 (zero net-new Sentry violations), T-015 (MP Brick clean), T-005 (home header fix deployed). Rollback: revert this one line. Run pnpm typecheck --filter=hospeda-web and pnpm lint. Commit atomically and push for staging deploy.

subtasks.title: Commit and push to trigger staging deploy

tasks.title: Deploy Phase 2 enforce to staging and monitor 48-hour soak period
tasks.description: After T-020 is deployed to staging: monitor for 48 hours. Check: (1) Sentry for new CSP block events that were not in Report-Only data; (2) any user reports of broken UX (auth, checkout, owner forms); (3) Sentry violation count stays at or near zero (excluding GAP-046-10 eval probe). If violations appear: document them and revert T-020 immediately (rollback = one-line revert + redeploy). If clean after 48h: document the soak pass. Acceptance criterion 2.D: header flipped + 48h clean soak.

subtasks.title: Confirm staging deploy is live with enforce header
Monitor Sentry CSP block events at 4h, 12h, 24h, 48h
Check for user reports of broken UX

tasks.title: Write regression test for enforce-mode header name in CSP middleware
tasks.description: After T-021 soak passes: update apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/csp-middleware.test.ts to assert the header name is Content-Security-Policy (NOT Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only). This locks in the enforce mode and prevents accidental revert. Also add a test asserting the header is present on all routes (home, alojamientos, checkout). Run pnpm test --filter=hospeda-web.

subtasks.title: Update csp-middleware.test.ts: assert enforce header name
Add test for header presence across multiple routes

tasks.title: [OPTIONAL 2.E] Add Sentry beforeSend filter to drop eval-probe reports
tasks.description: Optional per spec 2.E. The GAP-046-10 eval-probe generates benign but noisy CSP reports in Sentry. Add a beforeSend filter in apps/web/src/lib/sentry.ts (or equivalent initialization file) that drops CSP reports where violatedDirective = 'script-src' AND blockedUri contains 'eval'. This reduces ingest noise. Unit test: mock a Sentry event with eval-probe signature and verify the filter returns null. Run pnpm test --filter=hospeda-web.

subtasks.title: Add beforeSend filter for eval-probe CSP reports
Write unit test for the filter function

tasks.title: [OPTIONAL 2.E] Run logo-pattern blind-spot sweep across apps/web/src
tasks.description: Optional per spec 2.E. From SPEC-046 T-006 lesson: inline style with interpolated values like style={`background: ${color}`} bypasses nonce and would block under enforce CSP. Run: grep -rE 'style=.*\$\{' apps/web/src/ and audit each result. For each hit: determine if the interpolated value is a finite enum (safe) or dynamic user input (unsafe). Document findings. If unsafe patterns found: raise a follow-up task or fix inline. Tests: none (audit sweep).

subtasks.title: Audit each match: enum-safe vs dynamic
Raise follow-up tasks for any unsafe patterns

tasks.title: [OPTIONAL 2.E] Fix Sentry environment config — wire HOSPEDA_ENV instead of import.meta.env.MODE
tasks.description: Optional per spec 2.E. import.meta.env.MODE always evaluates to 'production' on built artifacts, causing staging traces to appear under 'production' in Sentry. Fix: wire HOSPEDA_ENV (or a PUBLIC_HOSPEDA_ENV env var) to the Sentry environment config in apps/web. Add env var to: packages/config/src/env-registry.*.ts (PUBLIC_HOSPEDA_ENV), apps/web/src/utils/env.ts, apps/web/.env.example. IMPORTANT: after step 4, tell the user to set PUBLIC_HOSPEDA_ENV=staging in Coolify for hospeda-web-staging. Run pnpm env:check:registry.

subtasks.title: Already wired in sentry.client.config.ts and sentry.server.config.ts
No registry changes needed — var already exists

tasks.title: [OPTIONAL 2.E] Bump staging tracing sample-rate to 1.0 via env-controlled config
tasks.description: Optional per spec 2.E. tracesSampleRate: 0.1 starves staging of CWV data. Make it env-controlled: read PUBLIC_SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE (or similar) in apps/web Sentry init, default to 0.1. Tell the user to set it to 1.0 in Coolify for hospeda-web-staging after implementation. Add to env registry (PUBLIC_SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE). Run pnpm env:check:registry. Tests: verify env var is validated by Zod.

subtasks.title: Wire to Sentry tracesSampleRate in apps/web init

tasks.title: Write and commit verification-authenticated-YYYY-MM-DD.md report
tasks.description: Write the formal authenticated crawl verification report at .qtm/specs/SPEC-142-csp-phase-2-and-coverage/verification-authenticated-2026-MM-DD.md. Format: same 6 assertions (a)-(f) as T-014 report from SPEC-046 plus new assertion (g): MercadoPago Brick loads and completes a test payment without CSP-driven failure. Source data: T-007/T-008/T-009 violation logs from T-016, T-015 MP Brick verification result. Commit to branch spec/SPEC-142-csp-phase-2-and-coverage. This is acceptance criterion 2.A: committed report with all assertions green.

subtasks.title: Write assertion (g): MP Brick verification result

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md and docs with CSP enforce status and close spec
tasks.description: After T-021 48h soak passes: update CLAUDE.md Common Gotchas section to note CSP is now in ENFORCE mode (not Report-Only). Update apps/web/docs/ or docs/ with the enforce status and any new allowed domains (MP Brick). Update .qtm/specs/SPEC-142-csp-phase-2-and-coverage/spec.md status to 'completed'. Update tasks/index.json and specs/index.json (use index-sync skill). Update specs-prioritization.csv: estado = 'done'. Commit docs separately from code.

subtasks.title: Update web docs with enforce status + MP domains
Run index-sync to close spec in both indexes
